<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Spatie\Permission\Events; use Illuminate\Broadcasting\InteractsWithSockets; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable; use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels; use Illuminate\Support\Collection; use Spatie\Permission\Contracts\Permission; class PermissionAttached { use Dispatchable; use InteractsWithSockets; use SerializesModels; /** * Internally the HasPermissions trait passes an array of permission ids (eg: int's or uuid's) * Theoretically one could register the event to other places and pass an Eloquent record. * So a Listener should inspect the type of $permissionsOrIds received before using. * * @param array|int[]|string[]|Permission|Permission[]|Collection $permissionsOrIds */ public function __construct(public Model $model, public mixed $permissionsOrIds) {} }
